nodes.title: Start Dodge Window
nodes.description: Given a character, when StartDodge(duration) is called, then IsDodging becomes true and DodgeWindowRemaining is set to duration.

nodes.title: Dodge Window Countdown
nodes.description: Given a character is dodging, when Update runs each frame, then DodgeWindowRemaining decreases by deltaTime. When it reaches <= 0, EndDodge() is called (IsDodging=false, DodgeWindowRemaining=0).

nodes.title: Dodge Success
nodes.description: Given a character is dodging with DodgeWindowRemaining > 0, when AttemptDodge() is called, then returns true. During ApplyCustomDamage, the dodge succeeds and all damage is avoided.

nodes.title: Dodge Fail
nodes.description: Given a character's dodge window has expired (DodgeWindowRemaining <= 0), when AttemptDodge() is called, then returns false and full damage applies.

nodes.title: Dodge Grants Kynde
nodes.description: Given a successful dodge, then executor gains 1 Kynde. If perfect timing (DodgeWindowRemaining < 0.3s), gains 2 Kynde instead.

nodes.title: Start Parry Window
nodes.description: Given a character, when StartParry(duration) is called, then IsParrying becomes true and ParryWindowRemaining is set to duration.

nodes.title: Parry Window Countdown
nodes.description: Given a character is parrying, when Update runs each frame, then ParryWindowRemaining decreases by deltaTime. When it reaches <= 0, EndParry() is called (IsParrying=false, ParryWindowRemaining=0).

nodes.title: Parry Reduces Damage
nodes.description: Given a character is parrying (IsParrying=true), when ApplyCustomDamage is called, then actual damage is multiplied by 0.3 (70% reduction).

nodes.title: Parry Success Grants Kynde
nodes.description: Given a successful parry (AttemptParry returns true), then executor gains 2 Kynde. If perfect timing (ParryWindowRemaining < 0.25s), gains 4 Kynde instead.

nodes.title: Parry Opens Counter Window
nodes.description: Given a successful parry in ResolveDefenseWindow, then a 0.5s counter window is started via StartCounterWindow(defender, attacker).

nodes.title: Counter Window Countdown
nodes.description: Given a counter window is active (IsCounterWindowActive=true), when Update runs, then CounterWindowRemaining decreases by deltaTime. At 0, EndCounterWindow + NextTurn are called.

nodes.title: Execute Counter In Window
nodes.description: Given a counter window is active, when ExecuteCounter() is called, then the defender's Counter action is found from AvailableActions and executed on the attacker. Counter window ends and NextTurn is called.

nodes.title: Perfect Timing Check
nodes.description: Given remainingTime and totalDuration, when IsPerfectTiming() is called, then returns true if (remainingTime / totalDuration) <= 0.15. Returns false if totalDuration <= 0.

nodes.title: Real Time Window Resolve
nodes.description: Given a real-time defense window expires, when ResolveDefenseWindow() runs, then: checks if parry succeeded (Ward + IsParrying + AttemptParry), checks dodge (Escapade + IsDodging + AttemptDodge), applies defense-window damage, starts counter window if parry succeeded.

nodes.title: Game Settings Adjust Window
nodes.description: Given GameSettings is assigned on TurnManager, when StartRealTimeWindow is called, then duration is modified by Settings.GetAdjustedWindow() for accessibility scaling.
